title: I.Sicily inscription 001293
support: A marble ?plaque, damaged or otherwise defaced on the right side

provenanceFound._: Found several years before 1833 near to the drinking trough/fountain between the Palazzo Rizzari and Palazzo di Mazza, to the north of the porta Stesicorea

provenanceLost._: Not seen since the 19th century, presumed lost.
